items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Trump crypto company's USD1 stablecoins backing UFC event bonuses
items.summary: A spokesperson for the Democratic National Committee decried the move as “an opportunity to use the power of the presidency to make [Trump] and his family even richer.”

items.title: Elon Musk Loses Again to OpenAI as Judge Dismisses xAI Trade Secret Lawsuit
items.summary: A federal judge handed Elon Musk his second defeat against OpenAI after finding xAI failed to show OpenAI improperly obtained confidential info.

items.title: Pudgy Penguins NFT Game 'Pudgy Party' Shuts Down Less Than a Year After Launch
items.summary: Pudgy Party, a mobile battle royale game, has closed up shop as the Pudgy Penguins team shifts its focus to its Pudgy World experience.

items.title: Nvidia’s $20 billion debt boom reinforces Bitcoin miners' AI pivot
items.summary: Nvidia’s planned bond sale reinforces booming AI infrastructure demand, strengthening the case for Bitcoin miners pivoting toward AI data centers.

items.title: Someone Just Lost $1 Million on Polymarket Over Spain World Cup Shocker
items.summary: One trader lost $1 million betting Spain would win. Another bought "No" at 9¢ and walked away with $4.3 million.

items.title: Rio de Janeiro Built an AI Model That Beat DeepSeek—But Was Based on Someone Else's Work
items.summary: Rio de Janeiro released a frontier-class AI model that claimed to beat Alibaba's best. Then Nex showed up with receipts.

items.title: CFTC hires SEC crypto task force adviser with blockchain forensics chops
items.summary: The CFTC staff appointment came amid the US Congress seeking to overhaul federal financial regulators’ roles over digital assets with the CLARITY Act.

items.title: BitMine boosts ETH holdings closer to $10B as bear market accumulation continues
items.summary: BitMine continued buying Ether through the market downturn, growing its stake to nearly 5% of the circulating supply while generating staking yield amid mounting ecosystem challenges.

items.title: Kraken rolls out perpetual futures for US traders through CFTC-regulated venue
items.summary: The offering follows Kraken's acquisition of Bitnomial and comes amid a broader push to bring crypto derivatives trading onshore.

items.title: Wall Street Could Boost Uniswap's Token Price Nearly 40x by 2030: Standard Chartered
items.summary: Uniswap’s native token UNI is set to surge nearly fortyfold in the coming years as Wall Street migrates on-chain, Standard Chartered said.

items.title: Hyperliquid loses Anthropic, OpenAI markets as creator shuts down project
items.summary: Ventuals, one of the teams behind real-world asset perpetuals on Hyperliquid, said it is closing its markets and joining another project in the ecosystem.

items.title: Anthropic Faces Lawsuit Over Allegedly Misleading Claude AI Pricing
items.summary: A class action lawsuit alleges Anthropic overstated the usage limits of its Claude Max subscription plans and misled customers about savings.

items.title: Solana Treasury Firm Forward Industries Keeps Trying to Acquire Rivals—But Nobody's Biting
items.summary: Forward Industries has been unsuccessful on all three recent attempts to combine with rival publicly traded Solana treasury firms.

items.title: These Bitcoin charts show how BTC price could hit $100K before October
items.summary: Bitcoin’s double-bottom setup, weekly RSI divergence and whale flows put traders on alert as BTC tests a key breakout zone.

items.title: Canadian PM Urges AI Diversification After US Anthropic Block, Decentralized AI Tokens Rally
items.summary: The U.S. move to pull Anthropic's top models offline shows the dangers of leaning on a few AI providers, Carney said.

items.title: Bitcoin Giant Strategy Pads Cash Cushion for Second Straight Week, Buys BTC
items.summary: Strategy expanded its USD Reserve to $1.1 billion and increased its total Bitcoin holdings, after dipping into those funds last month.

items.title: Bitcoin analysis warns over BTC price rejection as $67K approaches
items.summary: Bitcoin snatched upside liquidity as the US trading session began, but traders warned over a failure to preserve BTC price gains.

items.title: Pudgy Penguins winds down Pudgy Party mobile game
items.summary: Pudgy Penguins will halt development of Pudgy Party and focus on Pudgy World, as another Web3 gaming project shuts down after failing to find a sustainable business model.

items.title: Bybit expands RWA push with tokenized bond funds from PIMCO, CMBI
items.summary: The new offering gives eligible users access to tokenized institutional bond funds as demand for blockchain-based real-world assets continues to grow.

items.title: One Indicted Over Crypto ‘Wrench Attack’ in France
items.summary: The crypto-related assault reportedly involved attackers posing as police officers, and follows a spate of attacks in the country.

items.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Adds $139 Million in Ethereum Ahead of Preferred Share Trading Start
items.summary: BitMine Immersion Technologies expanded its leading Ethereum treasury to more than 5.6 million ETH valued at greater than $10 billion.

items.title: If America wants to lead in crypto, it must protect the people who build it
items.summary: Despite the Clarity Act’s advancement toward the finish line, there’s one provision under threat for builders that can’t be overlooked, argues Smith.

items.title: ‘Crypto spring’ is here, says one analyst after bitcoin's key signals turn bullish
items.summary: Standard Chartered analyst Geoffrey Kendrick's bullish call comes as spot bitcoin exchange-traded fund inflows return, oil prices fall and Coinbase's CEO says bitcoin likely bottomed near $60,000.

items.title: Kraken debuts U.S. perpetual futures as crypto derivatives move onshore
items.summary: Perpetual futures generated more than $60 trillion in volume last year, according to the crypto exchange, largely outside the U.S.

items.title: Saylor’s Strategy buys 1,587 BTC for $100M, holdings hit 846.8K
items.summary: Strategy acquired 1,587 Bitcoin for $100 million last week, lifting holdings to 846,842 BTC after raising $209 million through MSTR stock sales.

items.title: Coinbase's Brian Armstrong says bitcoin may have bottomed at $60,000
items.summary: Armstrong said his instinct is that bitcoin has probably found its floor, pointing to the four-year cycle that has historically marked lows.

items.title: Tokenization could push DeFi assets to $2.7T by 2030: Standard Chartered
items.summary: Standard Chartered forecasts assets locked in decentralized finance will reach $2.7 trillion by 2030, driven by tokenization and crypto-native growth.

items.title: XRP rockets 8% above $1.20 in first major breakout since June selloff
items.summary: Heavy volume pushed XRP through multiple resistance levels, with traders now focused on whether the rally can extend toward $1.30 after weeks of defensive positioning.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bittensor (TAO) surges 31.9%, leading index higher
items.summary: Near Protocol (NEAR), up 22.2% from Friday, was also a top performer.

items.title: Bitmine adds another $136 million of ether after raising $274 million in preferred stock sale
items.summary: Tom Lee's Ethereum treasury firm, through the preferred stock sale, is using a financing tool pioneered by Michael Saylor's bitcoin treasury firm Strategy.
